zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Archdeacon於大約1356年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾阮 拉尼恩時，他的父親John l'Achdecken52歲，母親Cecily De Haccombe47歲。他和Lady Joanna Bozoun至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1400年9月20日在英國享年45歲，埋葬在英國。

nameMeanings.name: Archdeacon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English ercedeken ‘archdeacon’ (Old English ercedīacon, Old French arc(h)ediacne), probably denoting someone in the service of an archdeacon.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Archdeacon was born about 1356, in Ruan Lanihorne, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, his father, John l'Achdecken, was 52 and his mother, Cecily De Haccombe, was 47. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Lady Joanna Bozoun. He died on 20 September 1400, in England, at the age of 45, and was buried in England.

fr.Hinton, St George, Somerset, England: Hinton St George, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Archdeacon est né environ 1356, à Ruan Lanihorne, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John l'Achdecken, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Cecily De Haccombe, avait 47 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Lady Joanna Bozoun. Il est décédé le 20 septembre 1400, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Archdeacon(이)가 대략 1356년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 루아 랜이호른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John l'Achdecken(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily De Haccombe(은)는 47세였다. 그는 Lady Joanna Bozoun(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년 9월 20일 영국에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

ru.Hinton, St George, Somerset, England: хинтон ст джеордж, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Archdeacon родился около 1356 г. в местности руань ланихаурн, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John l'Achdecken было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Cecily De Haccombe, 47. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Lady Joanna Bozoun. Он умер 20 сентября 1400 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.
